Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Search messages, read channels, find discussions across your workspace.

Google Drive.title: Google Drive
Google Drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents from Google Drive.

PharosLex.title: PharosLex — EU law
PharosLex.description: EU primary law and Court of Justice (CJEU) case law via the official EUR-Lex/CELLAR repository — search and fetch regulations (GDPR, AI Act, DORA, MiCA), directives, decisions, and case law in any of the 24 official EU languages; every result citation-ready (CELEX, source URL, retrieval date).
